reviews.review_description:
We've used it at several fairs already and it's been invaluable. We only paid for 24h use each time so we didn't need to use the subscription.

It does what it says, it shows a single video and restarts it when you put the headset on the next viewer.

Will be using for many more headsets in the future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such a great review! We're glad you find it useful.

Keep a look out for future updates.
